name: Action Figure and Real Person in the Same Frame
body:
---
title: Action Figure and Real Person in the Same Frame
category: 3d
tags:
  - anime
  - ai-art
  - 3d
  - colorful
author: '[@dotey](https://x.com/dotey)'
preview: /media/3d/action-figure-and-real-person-in-the-same-frame.webp
---

In a casual, everyday style as if shot on a mobile phone, an anime figure of [Jackie Chan] is placed on a desk, striking an exaggerated and cool pose, fully equipped. Simultaneously, the corresponding real-life person also appears in the frame, striking a similar pose to the figure, creating an interesting visual contrast with the figure and the real person in the same frame. The overall composition is harmonious and natural, delivering a warm and vibrant, true-to-life visual experience.

## Notes
The [Jackie Chan] in the prompt can be replaced with the name of any figurine character you want, or other types of characters.

## Source
- [Original Post](https://x.com/dotey/status/1920994118580183316)

## Example Output
![Action Figure and Real Person in the Same Frame](/media/3d/action-figure-and-real-person-in-the-same-frame.webp)
description_en: An image-generation prompt that places an anime action figure of a named character beside the matching real person striking the same pose, as if shot on a phone.
description_zh: 一个图像生成提示词，把指定角色的动漫手办与对应真人以相同姿势同框呈现，仿佛用手机随手拍下。
long_en: The prompt generates a casual phone-style shot of a desk action figure and its real-life counterpart in matching poses (the example uses a celebrity name, swappable via a bracketed placeholder). It produces a playful figure-versus-person contrast.
long_zh: 提示词生成手机随拍风格的画面，桌上手办与其真人原型以相同姿势同框（示例使用名人姓名，可通过方括号占位符替换），形成手办与真人的趣味对比。
sec_note_en: Requires an image-generation model; the placeholder often uses real celebrity/IP names, so mind likeness and trademark rights. No code execution.
sec_note_zh: 需要图像生成模型；占位符常填入真实名人/IP 名称，需注意肖像与商标权；不执行代码。
